completeness_table.this: normalization source recorded; dedicated theory NP downscoped

completeness_table.cms_2014: tau ID/trigger range in reference table

completeness_table.this: missing reduced sample; sideband deferred to data-validation phases
W1/W2/W3 MC only in expected SR model; real-data CR deferred
no reduced samples; omitted with explicit limitation

downscoped.impact: Could shift m_vis templates; carried to AN limitations and Phase 4b/5 obligations.
downscoped.name: tau_energy_scale
downscoped.reason: No reduced-sample tau energy scale variation or citable scale-factor prescription was available in Phase 4a.

downscoped.impact: Rate uncertainty partly covered by tau/open-data acceptance, but not separately measured.
downscoped.name: muon_efficiency_scale
downscoped.reason: No official reduced-file muon trigger/ID scale factors were available.

downscoped.impact: VBF and boosted category acceptances may be understated.
downscoped.name: JES_JER_MET
downscoped.reason: No correction variation machinery or systematic-shifted reduced inputs exist in the localized files.

downscoped.impact: Pileup remains a qualitative validation limitation.
downscoped.name: pileup
downscoped.reason: Phase 2 found PV_npvs but no pileup weights or pileup profile weights.

downscoped.impact: Signal acceptance and theory-shape uncertainties are not separated.
downscoped.name: PDF_scale_UE_PS
downscoped.reason: No event-level PDF/scale weights or alternative generator samples exist in the reduced mirror.

downscoped.impact: Instrumental fake component is omitted from expected-only workspace and carried as a major limitation.
downscoped.name: QCD_multijet
downscoped.reason: No reduced QCD MC exists and Phase 4a cannot use real-data sidebands to tune signal-region expectations.

downscoped.impact: Expected sensitivity and background composition are incomplete relative to CMS paper-level analyses.
downscoped.name: diboson_single_top_W4_inclusive_W_associated_H_HWW_extra_DY
downscoped.reason: No corresponding reduced files are present in the localized Phase 2 manifest.

flat_systematic_justification.dy_norm_open_data: Phase 1 and user prompt require 10-15% because the reduced analysis lacks official trigger turn-on and tau scale factors; Phase 4a uses the high end before data unblinding.
flat_systematic_justification.tau_open_data_acceptance: Phase 1 records CMS Run 1 tau ID/trigger variations in the 6-19% range and the reduced-file missing-scale-factor limitation; Phase 4a uses 15% as a predeclared open-data acceptance nuisance.

implemented.name: lumi_2012
implemented.source: CMS PAS LUM-13-001, recorded in phase3 normalization_inputs.json

implemented.name: dy_norm_open_data
implemented.source: Phase 1 [D6] and user-provided 10-15% requirement for missing trigger turn-on and tau efficiency scale factors

implemented.name: tau_open_data_acceptance
implemented.source: Phase 1 [D5]/[L2], with CMS Run 1 tau ID/trigger reference range cited in STRATEGY.md

implemented.applies_to: all samples sharing one MC-stat modifier per category
implemented.name: per-category staterror
implemented.size: sqrt(sum of weights squared) per bin
implemented.source: finite selected MC counts from phase3 selected_events.npz and official weights from normalization_inputs.json
